title: deyeuxia retrofracta
intro: Deyeuxia retrofracta, also known as 'Retrofracted False Oat Grass' or 'False Oat Grass', is a type of plant species that belongs to the grass family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Deyeuxia retrofracta include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In traditional herbal medicine, Deyeuxia retrofracta can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
